guardrail: This plan prioritizes ROI densification and manual-QC review using existing automatic ledgers. It does not extract new ROIs, accept labels, relax gates, or create calibrated diffusion/phase-boundary claims.

top_roi_actions.blocker_summary: Automatic/publication diffusion candidates; Control-balanced diffusion sanity candidates; Event/control diffusion separability; HDF5 spatial calibration metadata present; q70 positive confidence interval

top_roi_actions.review_question: Do masked optical kinetics and the radial/front view describe the same localized pre-event change?
